field_values.action_summary: The Winged Monkeys arrive and pick up the travelers. They fly over the hill, bypassing the frustrated Hammer-Heads, and transport the group across the landscape.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme wide shots (aerial) showing journey scale; Tracking shots following winged_monkeys flight path; POV shots from travelers looking down at hammer_heads
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Character grip and posture during aerial transport
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH022_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute a high-altitude transition sequence moving the travelers from the rocky hill territory toward the red-themed Country of the Quadlings. The sequence must emphasize the scale of the landscape and the shift in character emotion through aerial movement and speed.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto
- winged_monkeys
- hammer_heads (below)

## Required Environments
- rocky_hill_territory

## Continuity Constraints
- Flight height and velocity consistency
- Character grip and posture during aerial transport

## Beat List
- BT001: Winged_monkeys arrive and pick up the travelers.
- BT002: Ascent over the hills.
- BT003: Flight across the landscape bypassing hammer_heads.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
